seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The tone of the email must remain formal throughout.
new_constraint: Address the recipient using casual terms like "Hey" or "Hiya" instead of formal greetings.
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The tone of the email must remain formal throughout. Address the recipient using casual terms like "Hey" or "Hiya" instead of formal greetings.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Laptop Repair Status

Dear Repair Shop Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to inquire about the current status of my laptop repair. The device was dropped off on [Date], and I would appreciate an update on whether it has been completed or if there are any further steps required from my end.

Please let me know if you need any additional information from me to proceed.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Your Order/Receipt Number, if applicable]
